name: pi-ceo-operator-mcp
description: Internal read-only portfolio health MCP App for the Unite-Group operator

scripts.check:licences: node -e "const {execFileSync}=require('node:child_process');const rows=JSON.parse(execFileSync('npm',['query',':not([license])','--json'],{encoding:'utf8'}));const unexpected=rows.filter(p=>!['pi-ceo-operator-mcp','@skybridge/devtools'].includes(p.name));if(unexpected.length)throw new Error('unlicensed dependencies: '+unexpected.map(p=>p.name).join(','));console.log('licence exceptions verified: package + @skybridge/devtools upstream metadata gap')"
scripts.check:install-scripts: node -e "const lock=require('./package-lock.json');const found=Object.entries(lock.packages).filter(([,v])=>v.hasInstallScript).map(([p,v])=>p+'@'+v.version).sort();const expected=['node_modules/esbuild@0.28.1','node_modules/fsevents@2.3.3'];if(JSON.stringify(found)!==JSON.stringify(expected))throw new Error('install-script allow-list drift: '+found.join(','));console.log('install-script allow-list verified:',found.join(','))"
